zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bourne de Locke於1260年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德時，他的父親William Locke19歲，母親F Locke19歲。他和Ms Elizabeth de Holland至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1345年在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Bourn
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English: variant of   Bourne  .
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Burne
meanings: English: variant of   Bourne  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Locke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German: variant of   Lock  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Løkke: habitational name from a farm name, from Old Norse lykkja ‘enclosure’.
Chinese: variant of   Lok  .

variants.name: Lock
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near an enclosure, a place that could be locked, Middle English loke, Old English loca. Middle English loke also came to be used to denote a barrier, in particular a barrier on a river which could be opened and closed at will, and, by extension, a bridge. The surname may thus also have been a metonymic occupational name for a lock-keeper.
English, Dutch, and German: nickname for a person with fine hair, or curly hair, from Middle English loc, Middle High German lock(e) ‘lock (of hair), curl’. Compare Lok .
Americanized form of German   Loch  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bourne de Locke was born in 1260, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Locke, was 19 and his mother, F Locke, was 19. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Ms Elizabeth de Holland. He died in 1345, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bourne de Locke est né en 1260, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Locke, avait 19 ans et sa mère, F Locke, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Ms Elizabeth de Holland. Il est décédé en 1345, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bourne de Locke 1260 in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Locke 19 und seine Mutter F Locke 19. Er hatte mit Ms Elizabeth de Holland mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bourne de Locke è nato il nel 1260 nel Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Locke, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, F Locke, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Ms Elizabeth de Holland. Morì nel 1345, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bourne de Locke(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Locke(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 F Locke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Ms Elizabeth de Holland(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bourne de Locke родился в 1260 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Locke было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали F Locke, 19. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Ms Elizabeth de Holland. Он умер в 1345 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Bourne de Locke nació en 1260, en Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Locke, tenía 19 años y su mamá, F Locke, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Ms Elizabeth de Holland. Murió en 1345, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
